name: Cinnamon-Raisin Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Regular, Quick or Instant Oatmeal (Cream of Wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour, cereal, 1/4 cup sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon; set aside.
2. In a small bowl, combine milk, egg, margarine, and vanilla; stir into dry ingredients just until moistened. Stir in raisins.
3. Spoon mixture evenly into 12 greased muffin cups.
4. Bake at 400°F for 18-20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Remove from pan; brush tops of muffins with fruit juice and roll in remaining sugar.
6. Serve warm.
